name: China Mulans Nano Technology Corp., Ltd.
summary: China Mulans Nano Technology Corp., Ltd. focuses on the provision of systems integration and smart card services in Greater China and southeast Asia. The company, through its joint venture interest in CCF StarBridge Hengxin Corporation Limited, intends to offers systems integration and software development covering computer network projects, premises distribution systems, production monitoring and control systems, and security monitoring systems. China Mulans, through Ai Wei Information Technology Corporation Limited, markets and distributes smart cards for the Ministry of Health. The company was formerly known as StarBridge Global, Inc. and changed its name to China Mulans Nano Technology Corp., Ltd. in January 2007. China Mulans Nano Technology Corp., Ltd. is based in Naples, Florida.
